description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines variables BUILDER_IMAGE_REVISION=0.0.35, GCR_REGISTRY, GCR_REGISTRY_PUBLIC, HELM_URL (using HELM_VERSION 2.12.0) and HELM_VERSION=2.12.0. Use a global before_script that writes the GitLab CI token to ~/.git-credentials, configures the git credential helper, downloads and extracts Helm from $HELM_URL, moves it to /usr/bin/helm and makes it executable, runs helm version --client, logs into GCR with a JSON key and into the GitLab registry with $CI_JOB_TOKEN, installs jq, python-pip, python-dev and build-essential via apt-get, installs yq via pip, and sources ci-scripts/set-release-version.sh and ci-scripts/set-container-tag.sh. Define a single build stage with a build job that runs on the image registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-omnibus-builder/ruby_docker:${BUILDER_IMAGE_REVISION}, uses the docker:dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375, and executes the script build-scripts/build-marketplace-release.sh. The job is tagged with docker and runs in the build stage.
